title: Genetics and Genomics of Social Behavior in a Chicken Model.
author: Johnsson M Henriksen R Fogelholm J Hoglund A Jensen P Wright D
content: S-EPMC5937196 PMC5937196 Genetics and Genomics of Social Behavior in a Chicken Model. The identification of genes affecting sociality can give insights into the maintenance and development of sociality and personality.
